name: dev
description: Enforced dev workflow (/dev + /spec + /prd) with dual-model review, independent evaluator architecture, AC-based module progress formula, aligned §N.M section numbering, git auto-sync with LLM-generated commit messages, opt-in statusline, `/spec upgrade-template` for template migration preserving /dev verification progress, and `/prd` skill for iterative PRD generation with 4-dimension coverage evaluator. MODULE template gains §1.1 Serves PRD topics, §2.13 Operations, §2.14 Observability. Adds /dev PLAN routing via CONTEXT-MAP + domain-term resolution via GLOSSARY (auto-generated by /spec and /prd). **2.5.0** adds ADR (Architecture Decision Records) system: `/spec adr-new` subcommand + inline ADR template, Phase 1.0 conflict detection over Accepted ADRs (22 opposing-keyword pairs + decision-marker proximity), /dev PLAN ADR compliance block, /dev DOCS ADR check (abort+restart).
